name: lunchbox-tools
description: Toolbox for commiting, branching, and releasing packages

scripts.build: concurrently -n utils,branch,commit "pnpm --filter @lunchbox-tools/utils run build" "pnpm --filter @lunchbox-tools/branch run build" "pnpm --filter @lunchbox-tools/commit run build"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n utils,branch,commit "pnpm --filter @lunchbox-tools/utils run dev" "pnpm --filter @lunchbox-tools/branch run dev" "pnpm --filter @lunchbox-tools/commit run dev"
scripts.lint: concurrently -n utils,branch,commit "pnpm --filter @lunchbox-tools/utils run lint" "pnpm --filter @lunchbox-tools/branch run lint" "pnpm --filter @lunchbox-tools/commit run lint"
scripts.test: concurrently -n utils,branch,commit "pnpm --filter @lunchbox-tools/utils run test" "pnpm --filter @lunchbox-tools/branch run test" "pnpm --filter @lunchbox-tools/commit run test"
scripts.test:verbose: concurrently -n utils,branch,commit "pnpm --filter @lunchbox-tools/utils run test:verbose" "pnpm --filter @lunchbox-tools/branch run test:verbose" "pnpm --filter @lunchbox-tools/commit run test:verbose"
